title: Congress Gets 7 New Crypto Tax Bills: Here's What's In Them
summary: The crypto tax bills—the first of their kind to be deliberated by congressional leadership—will be discussed at a House hearing on Tuesday. The proposals cover a range of issues, including tax treatment of staking rewards and capital gains reporting.
body:
Congress is set to discuss seven new crypto tax bills in a House hearing on Tuesday, marking the first time such legislation has been deliberated by congressional leadership. These bills aim to address the growing need for clear tax guidelines in the rapidly evolving crypto space. The proposals cover a variety of topics, from the tax treatment of staking rewards to capital gains reporting for crypto transactions.

The seven bills include proposals to simplify tax reporting for crypto users, clarify the tax status of decentralized finance (DeFi) activities, and establish clearer guidelines for taxing crypto transactions. One bill specifically targets the tax treatment of staking rewards, which have been a point of confusion for many crypto investors. Another bill aims to streamline capital gains reporting for crypto assets, making it easier for taxpayers to comply with IRS regulations.

These tax bills could significantly impact everyday crypto users by providing much-needed clarity on tax obligations. For instance, clearer guidelines on staking rewards could help investors avoid unexpected tax liabilities. Simplified reporting requirements could reduce the complexity and cost of tax compliance for crypto holders. The outcomes of this hearing could set the stage for future crypto tax policies in the U.S.

The hearing on Tuesday will be a crucial moment for the crypto community, as it could lead to tangible changes in how cryptocurrencies are taxed. Crypto users should pay close attention to the discussions and potential outcomes, as these bills could directly affect their tax responsibilities. Stay informed and be prepared to adapt to any new tax regulations that may emerge from this hearing.
twitterThread: Congress is reviewing 7 new crypto tax bills—the first of their kind deliberated by congressional leadership. Here's what's in them.
The bills cover staking rewards, DeFi tax status, and simplified reporting. One proposal aims to clarify tax rules for staking, a major pain point for investors.

The House hearing on Tuesday could reshape crypto taxes. Stay tuned for updates—this affects every crypto holder. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-05-congress-introduces-7-new-crypto-tax-bills-in-major-hearing
standaloneTweet: 7 new crypto tax bills—the first of their kind deliberated by congressional leadership—are being discussed in Congress, potentially changing how staking, DeFi, and capital gains are taxed. Pay attention—this could impact your crypto taxes.
